title: What's New on MedlinePlus
text:
Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Antibiotic Sensitivity Test Basic Metabolic Panel (BMP) Catecholamine Tests How to Cope with Medical Test Anxiety How to Prepare for a Lab Test How to Prepare Your Child for a Lab Test Measuring Blood Pressure Platelet Tests What You Need to Know About Blood Testing Xylose Testing 
December 10, 2020
New Genetic Page
A new page has been added to MedlinePlus Genetics:
Terminal osseous dysplasia 
Terminal osseous dysplasia is a disorder primarily involving skeletal abnormalities and certain skin changes. Explore symptoms, inheritance, genetics of this condition.
November 18, 2020
MedlinePlus Social Media Toolkit
MedlinePlus Social Media Toolkit is now available.
Share these MedlinePlus resources on your social media or other communication channels to connect your community to high-quality, relevant health and wellness information that is trusted and easy to understand, in both English and Spanish.
November 10, 2020
New Health Topics
Two new topics have been added to MedlinePlus:Â 
COVID-19 Testing 
Learn about the different types of tests for COVID-19, who needs a test, and how and where you can get a test.
COVID-19 Vaccines Â 
Currently there is no approved vaccine for COVID-19 in the United States. Learn about the vaccines that are being developed and tested, and how you can enroll in a clinical trial.
October 27, 2020
New
